titleStmt.title: SII 16.236: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 236. (A.R. No. 318 of 1922.) KĀLAVAPALLI, MADANAPALLI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying near the Kālavapalle-Amma temple.
This is dated Śaka 1480, Kāḷayukti, Māgha ba. 14, Śivarātri, corresponding to 1559, A.D., February 6, Monday, °30.

It records the gift of the income from the taxes (varttana) mahārācha-tēva etc., from certain villages in Rāmagiridurga-sīma in Udayagiri-Mārjavāḍa in Penugoṇḍa, to the goddess Aṅkāḷamma of Kāluvapalle by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jilleḷa Kṛishṇamarājayya-Veṅgaḷrāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁ
bulu 1480 Agunēṭi kāḷayukti saṁvvatsara mā
ga ba 14 śivarātri puṇyakālānaku śrīmadrājādhirāja
rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra sadāśivadēvama
hārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanamā
rūḍhulai pṛthivisāṁmrājyaṁ sēyucuṁnuṁ
ḍagānu śrīmanmahādēvi Ayina Aṁkālammagā
rikinni śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara jileḷa kriṣṇamarāja
yya veṁgaḷrājugāru daṁḍaṁpeṭi samarppiṁccina
dharmmaśāśanaṁ penuṁgoṁḍa vudayagiri mārjavāḍa
staḷālanu rāmagiridurggaṁ sīma
lōni kāluvapalli maddināyinipāḷeṁ peda bali
kōṭapalli yaradoḍḍi grāmāla
nu galigina mahārāca tēvalunnu nagariki vacē vartanalu
svāṁmyasvataṁtrāluṁnu Aṁnninni yī śiva
rātri puṇyakālamaṁdu dhāravōśi kā
luvapalli Aṁmaku pūjanaivēdya The
Digital edition of SII 16.236 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
